title: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: NXP (NXPI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 36.07% and 0.55%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Dow Notches Strongest Month of Trading Since 1976
text: At +11%, it's the best October on record for the blue-chip index and the strongest single-month of trading since the U.S. Bicentennial.

title: Should you buy NXP Semiconductors stock after its Q3 report?
text: NXP Semiconductors NV (NASDAQ: NXPI) reported market-beating results for its fiscal third quarter late on Monday. Shares are still “down” slightly after the bell.

title: NXP Semiconductors Reports Third Quarter 2022 Results
text: EINDHOVEN, The Netherlands, Oct. 31, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ: NXPI) today reported financial results for the third quarter, ended October 2, 2022.

title: The 7 Best Tech Stocks to Buy in November
text: Tech stocks have suffered disproportionately in the current bear market, as they tend to do in every bear market. But the bullish long-term bias of the market tells us that stocks will almost certainly resume their uptrend.

title: NXP and German Aerospace Center DLR Collaborate on Quantum Computing Technologies in Germany
text: HAMBURG, Germany, Oct. 27, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ: NXPI) today announced its collaboration with the German Aerospace Center (DLR) and other partners on ion trap-based quantum computers as part of the DLR's Quantum Computing Initiative. The initiative aims to build quantum computers to help enable new innovations across energy, automotive, government, aerospace and other critical infrastructure.

title: What's in Store for NXP Semiconductors' (NXPI) Q3 Earnings?
text: NXP Semiconductors' (NXPI) Q3 results are likely to reflect gains from robust products, strong customer demand and growing design wins. However, supply-chain disturbances might have been a bane.

title: NXP Matter™ Development Platforms Simplify and Accelerate Use of New Matter Standard
text: EINDHOVEN, The Netherlands, Oct. 26, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ: NXPI) today announced new Matter™-enabled development platforms to simplify and accelerate the creation of Matter devices for smart homes and buildings. These new Matter development platforms enable designers to easily leverage the breadth of NXP's portfolio across processing, connectivity and security solutions to create a wide variety of IoT devices ranging from battery-operated devices like sensors and actuators to complex gateways with Thread Border Router and Matter Controller capabilities.

title: NXP Semiconductors Announces Conference Call to Review Third Quarter 2022 Financial Results
text: EINDHOVEN, The Netherlands, Oct. 18, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ: NXPI) today announced it will release financial results for the third quarter 2022 after the close of normal trading on the NASDAQ Global Select Market on Monday, October 31, 2022. The company will host a conference call with the financial community on Tuesday, November 1, 2022 at 8:00 a.m. U.S. Eastern Daylight Time (EDT).

title: NXP OrangeBox Unifies Automotive Wireless Connectivity into a Single Domain Controller to Simplify Development and Security
text: DETROIT, Oct. 18, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- NXP Semiconductors (NASDAQ: NXPI) today announced the OrangeBox automotive-grade development platform, which integrates a wide variety of NXP wireless technologies, from broadcast radio, Wi-Fi 6 and Bluetooth, to secure car access with Ultra-Wideband (UWB) and Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE), and 802.11p-based V2X. The OrangeBox is a single, security enhanced, modular development platform that provides a unified interface between the vehicle's gateway and its wired and wireless technologies. By doing so, it provides a means for next-generation cars to securely communicate with the world around them.

title: 7 Tech Stocks That Are Too Cheap to Ignore
text: With the ugliness in the equities sector, astute investors may want to shift their focus to cheap tech stocks. Granted, among the major indices, the technology-centric Nasdaq Composite suffered the most thus far.

title: 1 Monster Opportunity in the Global Chip Shortage
text: The auto industry's need for a lot of chips makes this semiconductor stock a solid bet.

title: Infineon Vs. NXPI: Assessing Growth Prospects Amid Energy And Slowdown Concerns
text: European-based Infineon and NXPI have seen their share price plummet due to high energy prices affecting Europe and concerns about demand slumping. Both have strong exposure to the automotive sector and derive significant portions of their revenues from Europe where there are problems and China where there are economic growth concerns.
